defaultValue: LLM provider, API key, model, and custom endpoint are configured ONLY via saves/common/Starlogue_credentials.json. Luna does not provide backend override fields anymore. Use keys: starlogue_provider, starlogue_api_key, starlogue_model, starlogue_endpoint. Template: data/config/starlogue/credentials.example.json.

fieldDescription: LLM sampling temperature. 0.7-0.9 recommended for roleplay.
Maximum tokens per LLM response. Keep low for faster local inference.
Number of back-and-forth turns retained in the LLM context window.
Fraction of max_tokens budget allocated to history.
Scales all memory event TTLs. 0.5 = decay twice as fast. 2.0 = linger twice as long.
Maximum reputation points gainable via Starlogue per 30 in-game day window.
Maximum reputation points loseable via Starlogue per 30 in-game day window.
Write full system prompts to starsector.log at DEBUG level.
Write all LLM tool calls and execution results to starsector.log.
When enabled, append conversation + tool events to saves/common/Starlogue_conversations.ndjson (and fallbacks).
When enabled and conversation log is on, record provider-native reasoning/thinking blocks when the API returns them.
When enabled and conversation log is on, record redacted request/response metadata (no API keys; truncated).
Max ships listed per side in VISUAL_SIGHTING_REPORT and inspect_fleet brief.
